name: Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick over the beans and cover with cold water. Soak overnight.
2. In the morning, bring to a boil. Simmer until the husks curl when you blow on them.
3. Rinse with hot water.
4. Put half of the beans into the pot. Scatter half of the diced onion and dots of margarine over them.
5. Repeat with the second half of beans and remaining ingredients.
6. In a measuring cup, mix together sugar, salt, ginger, dry mustard, and thyme.
7. Add molasses to 1/4 cup mark in the measuring cup. Add hot water to the top until it reaches the 1/2 cup mark and mix well.
8. Pour over the beans.
9. Add enough hot water to barely cover the beans.
10. Cook all day in a crockpot.
11. Remove the lid during the last hour to cook down or cool, then reheat.
12. The recipe can be doubled for a 4-quart crockpot and leftovers can be frozen.
